discoveryReviewNotes: A broad official-source review across Helsinki, Espoo, Vantaa and Kauniainen found no additional in-scope active venue beyond the maintained baseline. New dated and seasonal open-mat evidence was added to existing venue records; out-of-scope neighboring municipalities and non-BJJ wrestling sessions were excluded.

coverage.notes: Official sources were mapped for 19 active training locations and one announced future academy. A venue count is not an organization count because several organizations operate at multiple locations.
Official sources were mapped for eight active training locations. Only sources with current first-party evidence are included in the count.
Official sources were mapped for four active training locations. One currently has an explicitly public recurring open mat.

Finnish- and Swedish-language searches and municipal activity sources did not reveal a current BJJ or submission-wrestling venue with an official source. The city remains in scope and must be searched again during discovery reviews.

venues.evidenceSummary: The official open-mat policy welcomes visitors from other clubs. The official Gymdesk calendar lists a recurring Sunday 12:00–14:00 No-gi open mat without a member-only restriction and accepts visitor bookings.

candidateOpenMats.notes: The Gymdesk session is titled OPEN MAT (NOGI), recurs Sundays, has no cancelled dates and is not labelled members-only. Visitors must reserve a spot. The general 15-euro visitor pass is not attributed specifically to open mats, so the event price remains unknown.

venues.monitoringNotes: Publish only the Sunday No-gi session. The summer weekday open mats are explicitly labelled for members and remain excluded.

venues.evidenceSummary: The official 15 June–9 August summer schedule lists BJJ open mats on Saturday and Sunday from 15:00 to 17:00. It does not state outside-club eligibility or an open-mat price for these sessions, so they are published only with a confirmation warning.

venues.evidenceSummary: The official summer 2026 calendar lists a Saturday 10:30–12:00 BJJ open mat through 2 August, and the official English calendar identifies the recurring slot as BJJ/No-Gi. The project owner confirmed on 16 July 2026 that it is free, open to outside-club practitioners and allows Gi or No-gi.

candidateOpenMats.notes: The official calendar provides the current seasonal time. The project owner confirmed free outside-club access and Gi/No-gi eligibility on 16 July 2026.

venues.monitoringNotes: Publish the summer slot only through 2 August 2026. Recheck the calendar for exceptions and replace the bounded series only after Loop publishes its autumn schedule.

venues.evidenceSummary: The official membership flow identifies a weekly Sunday 12:00–13:30 Gi and No-gi open mat at Urhea. The 25-euro annual open-mat membership and advance-contact visitor rule are current, and community feedback says the session is running in summer. Because the dated calendar contains no matching occurrence in the current window, dates are published only with a confirmation warning.

candidateOpenMats.notes: The membership source says the Urhea session is weekly and community feedback says it is running in summer, but the dated calendar contains no matching occurrence in the current window. Publish only with a visible confirmation warning.

venues.monitoringNotes: Check the dated calendar weekly. Keep materialized dates uncertain until the Urhea open mat reappears there or the organizer confirms exact summer dates.
